### Tools & Techniques
**Institutional Asset Sentiment Indices by Permutable AI: Source**  
This tool transforms millions of global narratives into structured sentiment data for assets, enabling investors to quantify market mood and identify trends. It gives individual investors an edge by providing institutional-grade intelligence for better-timed entries, ideal for intermediate traders using AI to augment technical or fundamental analysis. ### Quick Hits
**2026 US ACH rules: Impact on RTP, FedNow and fraud controls**  
New rules will address emerging fraud threats like real-time payment scams, prompting banks and fintechs to bolster controls such as AI monitoring. Investors should consider rotating into cybersecurity or compliant fintech stocks on the TSX or NASDAQ for potential growth from enhanced regulations.
